---
title: "Lauer_etal_DNAm_blood_models1_2"
author: "M. Ellesse Lauer"
date: "2026-03-23"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#Packages:
library(brms) #version 2.23.0, Bayesian GLMM fitting
library(dplyr) #version 1.1.4, for data manipulation
library(tidyr) #version 1.3.1, for data reshaping
library(mice) #version 3.18.0, multiple imputations package
library(tibble) #version 3.3.0, for data frame handling
library(bayesplot) #version 1.14.0, MCMC and PP check plots
library(tidybayes) #version 3.0.7, Posterior draws extraction
library(ggplot2) #version 3.5.2, visualizations
```

```{r}
options(brms.backend = "cmdstanr") #cmdstanr version 0.8.0, Stan backend for brms package
```

```{r}
#Data loading:
df_blood_imputed <- read.csv("../data/Lauer_etal_DNAm_blood_finalSB.csv")
```

```{r}
df_blood_imputed <- df_blood_imputed %>%
  mutate(
    timeday = factor(timeday, levels = c("0", "0.25", "1", "6", "9", "12", "14")),
    CGsite = factor(CGsite),
    EP = factor(EP),
    Stage = factor(Stage),
    BirdID = factor(BirdID)
  )
```

```{r, eval=FALSE}
# Data imputation code: Do not execute if uploading "Lauer_etal_DNAm_blood_imputed.csv" for Bayesian GLMM.
#Code included for transparency
imp <- mice(df_blood_imputed[, c("BirdID", "CGsite", "timeday", "DNAm")],
            m = 5,     
            method = "logreg", 
            seed = 123 
            )

# Extract one complete imputed dataset
dataset_imp <- complete(imp, 1)

# Replace DNAm column in main dataset
df_blood_imputed$DNAm <- dataset_imp$DNAm
df_blood_imputed$DNAm <- as.numeric(as.character(dataset_imp$DNAm))
```

```{r}
df_blood_imputed <- df_blood_imputed  %>%
  mutate(
    BirdID = factor(BirdID),
    CGsite = factor(CGsite),
    timeday = factor(timeday),
    EP = factor(EP),
    Stage = factor(Stage),
    DNAm = as.numeric(DNAm),
    BodyMass = as.numeric(BodyMass),
  FinalSBc  = as.numeric(scale(FinalSB)),
    BodyMassz = as.numeric(scale(BodyMass))
    )

```

```{r, eval=FALSE}
write.csv(df_blood_imputed, "../data/Lauer_etal_DNAm_blood_imputed.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Reading in the new datafile with the centering of BodyMass, FinalSB columns and the imputed DNA methylation in DNAm column
df_blood_imputed_transformed <- read.csv("../data/Lauer_etal_DNAm_blood_imputed.csv")

# Convert to correct types
df_blood_imputed_transformed <- df_blood_imputed_transformed %>%
  mutate(
    # Factors
    DNAm = as.factor(DNAm),
    EP = as.factor(EP),
    Stage = as.factor(Stage),
    BirdID = as.factor(BirdID),
    BodyMassz = as.numeric(BodyMassz),
    FinalSBc = as.numeric(FinalSBc),
    timedayz = as.numeric(scale(timeday))
  )

```

```{r}
#Defining DNAm model formula:
#Structure:
#DNAm binary behavior at each CpG site at each time point
#timedayz: z-score centered time of infection (0 is the average time during infection)
#CGsite: categorical identifier of CpG site - CpG 1 is the same here as in Kilvitis et al. 2019
#EP: categorical high or low determined in Sheldon et al. 2023
#Stage: juvenile, male, or female - Sheldon et al. 2023
#BodyMassz: standardized body mass (mean = 0, SD = 1) in grams from capture in Sheldon et al. 2023

#Interaction structure:
#timedayz*CGsite: interaction of time and CpG site to capture the behaviors of each of the sites at each of the timepoints for DNAm
#(1+timedayz|p|BirdID): each bird has its own intercept and time slope to account for variability in response to time of infection -> estimates the slope per bird of DNA methylation change over time for each CpG site as a random intercept and a random slope
#(1|BirdID:CGsite): per bird CpG site offset to account for repeated measures of the same CpG per bird over time; allows different site-specific random intercepts nested within the birds

#Bernoulli distribution with a logit link function because DNAm is a binary variable

form_dnam_sep <- bf(
  DNAm ~ timedayz * CGsite + EP + Stage + BodyMassz +
         (1 + timedayz | p | BirdID) + (1 | BirdID:CGsite),
  family = bernoulli(link = "logit")
)
```

```{r}

priors_dnam_sep <- c(
  set_prior("normal(0, 1)", class = "b"),             
  set_prior("student_t(3, 0, 1)", class = "sd"),    
  set_prior("student_t(3, 0, 2.5)", class = "Intercept"), 
  set_prior("lkj(2)", class = "cor")

)
```

```{r}
fit_dnam_sep <- brm(
  formula = form_dnam_sep,
  data    = df_blood_imputed_transformed,
  prior   = priors_dnam_sep,
  backend = "cmdstanr",
  chains  = 4,
  iter    = 2000,
  warmup  = 1000,
  threads = threading(2),
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.98, max_treedepth = 15),
  seed    = 1234,
  refresh = 200
)

```

```{r}
summary(fit_dnam_sep)
mcmc_plot(fit_dnam_sep, type = "trace")
pp_check(fit_dnam_sep, type = "bars_grouped", group = "CGsite")
pp_check(fit_dnam_sep, type = "stat", stat = "mean")
pp_check(fit_dnam_sep, type = "bars_grouped", group = "timedayz")
```


```{r}
#Extracting slopes
re_Bird   <- ranef(fit_dnam_sep)$BirdID
re_Site   <- ranef(fit_dnam_sep)$`BirdID:CGsite` # intercepts only, slopes are from fixed effects

# Extract fixed effects
fe <- fixef(fit_dnam_sep)
#Compute per-CpG slope
# fixed-effect slope for timedayz
beta_time <- fe["timedayz","Estimate"]

# CpG-specific fixed-effect slope deviations
site_slopes_fixed <- c(
  "CG01" = 0,
  "CG02" = fe["timedayz:CGsiteCG02","Estimate"],
  "CG03" = fe["timedayz:CGsiteCG03","Estimate"],
  "CG04" = fe["timedayz:CGsiteCG04","Estimate"],
  "CG05" = fe["timedayz:CGsiteCG05","Estimate"]
)

# random slope for each Bird
bird_slopes <- re_Bird[,,"timedayz"][,"Estimate"]
names(bird_slopes) <- rownames(re_Bird)

# Build Bird × CpG dataset
df_slopes <- expand_grid(
  BirdID = names(bird_slopes),
  CGsite = names(site_slopes_fixed)
) %>%
  mutate(
    slope = beta_time +
            site_slopes_fixed[CGsite] +
            bird_slopes[BirdID]
  )

#df_slopes should contain 1 slope per bird per site

df_slope_predictors <- df_slopes %>%
  left_join(df_blood_imputed_transformed %>% 
              select(BirdID, FinalSBc, EP, Stage, BodyMassz) %>% distinct(),
            by = "BirdID")

```


```{r}
prior_finalSB_site <- c(
  set_prior("normal(0, 0.5)", class = "b"),               
  set_prior("student_t(3, 0, 1)", class = "Intercept"),    
  set_prior("student_t(3, 0, 1)", class = "sigma"),       
  set_prior("student_t(3, 0, 1)", class = "sd", group = "CGsite") 
)

```


```{r}
fit_FinalSB_slope_int <- brm(
  FinalSBc ~ EP * slope + Stage + BodyMassz + (1 | CGsite),
  data   = df_slope_predictors,
  family = gaussian(),
  prior  = prior_finalSB_site, 
  chains = 4,
  iter   = 4000,
  warmup = 2000,
  cores = 4,
  threads = threading(2),
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99),
  seed = 777
)
```

```{r}
summary(fit_FinalSB_slope_int)
ce_slope <- conditional_effects(fit_FinalSB_slope_int, effects = "slope")
plot(ce_slope)
ce_slope_EP <- conditional_effects(fit_FinalSB_slope_int, effects = "slope:EP")
plot(ce_slope_EP)

mcmc_plot(fit_FinalSB_slope_int, type = "trace")
pp_check(fit_FinalSB_slope_int)
pp_check(fit_FinalSB_slope_int, type = "stat", stat = "mean") 
pp_check(fit_FinalSB_slope_int, type = "stat_grouped", group = "CGsite", stat = "mean")
```

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
